children.heading: Order of crediting payments
children.label: 3 Order of crediting payments
children.text: For purposes of paragraph (2)(B), a payment of estimated tax shall be credited against unpaid required installments in the order in which such installments are required to be paid.

children.heading: Number of required installments; due dates
children.label: c Number of required installments; due dates

children.heading: Payable in 4 installments
children.label: 1 Payable in 4 installments
children.text: There shall be 4 required installments for each taxable year.

children.heading: Time for payment of installments
children.label: 2 Time for payment of installments
children.text: In the case of the followingrequired installments:The due date is:1stApril 152ndJune 153rdSeptember 154thDecember 15.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this section, the amount of any required installment shall be 25 percent of the required annual payment.

children.label: i
children.text: 100 percent of the tax shown on the return for the taxable year (or, if no return is filed, 100 percent of the tax for such year), or

children.label: ii
children.text: 100 percent of the tax shown on the return of the corporation for the preceding taxable year.

children.heading: Large corporations required to pay 100 percent of current year tax
children.label: 2 Large corporations required to pay 100 percent of current year tax

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Except as provided in subparagraph (B), clause (ii) of paragraph (1)(B) shall not apply in the case of a large corporation.

children.heading: May use last year’s tax for 1st installment
children.label: B May use last year’s tax for 1st installment
children.text: Subparagraph (A) shall not apply for purposes of determining the amount of the 1st required installment for any taxable year. Any reduction in such 1st installment by reason of the preceding sentence shall be recaptured by increasing the amount of the next required installment determined under paragraph (1) by the amount of such reduction.

children.heading: Lower required installment where annualized income installment or adjusted seasonal installment is less than amount determined under subsection (d)
children.label: e Lower required installment where annualized income installment or adjusted seasonal installment is less than amount determined under subsection (d)
A
children.text: the amount of such required installment shall be the annualized income installment (or, if lesser, the adjusted seasonal installment), and

children.label: B
children.text: any reduction in a required installment resulting from the application of this paragraph shall be recaptured by increasing the amount of the next required installment determined under subsection (d)(1) (as so modified) by the amount of such reduction (and by increasing subsequent required installments to the extent that the reduction has not previously been recaptured under this subparagraph).

children.label: I

children.label: II
children.text: for the first 3 months of the taxable year, in the case of the 2nd required installment,

children.label: ii

children.heading: Annualization
children.label: i Annualization
children.text: The taxable income, adjusted financial statement income (as defined in section 56A), and modified taxable income shall be placed on an annualized basis under regulations prescribed by the Secretary.

children.heading: Applicable percentage
children.label: ii Applicable percentage
children.text: In the case of the followingrequired installments:The applicable percentage is:1st252nd503rd754th100.

children.label: iii Modified taxable income
children.text: The term “modified taxable income” has the meaning given such term by section 59A(c)(1).

children.text: An election under clause (i) or (ii) shall apply to the taxable year for which made and such an election shall be effective only if made on or before the date required for the payment of the first required installment for such taxable year.

children.heading: Limitation on application of paragraph
children.label: B Limitation on application of paragraph
children.text: This paragraph shall apply only if the base period percentage for any 6 consecutive months of the taxable year equals or exceeds 70 percent.

children.label: i
children.text: take the taxable income for all months during the taxable year preceding the filing month,

children.label: ii
children.text: divide such amount by the base period percentage for all months during the taxable year preceding the filing month,

children.label: iii
children.text: determine the tax on the amount determined under clause (ii), and

children.label: iv
children.text: multiply the tax computed under clause (iii) by the base period percentage for the filing month and all months during the taxable year preceding the filing month.

children.heading: Base period percentage
children.label: i Base period percentage
children.text: The base period percentage for any period of months shall be the average percent which the taxable income for the corresponding months in each of the 3 preceding taxable years bears to the taxable income for the 3 preceding taxable years.

children.heading: Filing month
children.label: ii Filing month
children.text: The term “filing month” means the month in which the installment is required to be paid.

children.heading: Reorganization, etc.
children.label: iii Reorganization, etc.
children.text: The Secretary may by regulations provide for the determination of the base period percentage in the case of reorganizations, new corporations, and other similar circumstances.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Any amounts required to be included in gross income under section 951(a) (and credits properly allocable thereto) shall be taken into account in computing any annualized income installment under paragraph (2) in a manner similar to the manner under which partnership income inclusions (and credits properly allocable thereto) are taken into account.

children.label: I
children.text: subparagraph (A) shall not apply, and

children.label: II
children.text: for purposes of computing any annualized income installment for such taxable year, the taxpayer shall be treated as having received ratably during such taxable year items of income and credit described in subparagraph (A) in an amount equal to 115 percent of the amount of such items shown on the return of the taxpayer for the preceding taxable year (the second preceding taxable year in the case of the first and second required installments for such taxable year).

children.heading: Special rule for noncontrolling shareholder
children.label: ii Special rule for noncontrolling shareholder

children.heading: In general
children.label: I In general
children.text: If a taxpayer making the election under clause (i) is a noncontrolling shareholder of a corporation, clause (i)(II) shall be applied with respect to items of such corporation by substituting “100 percent” for “115 percent”.

children.heading: Noncontrolling shareholder
children.label: II Noncontrolling shareholder
children.text: For purposes of subclause (I), the term “noncontrolling shareholder” means, with respect to any corporation, a shareholder which (as of the beginning of the taxable year for which the installment is being made) does not own (within the meaning of section 958(a)), and is not treated as owning (within the meaning of section 958(b)), more than 50 percent (by vote or value) of the stock in the corporation.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Any dividend received from a closely held real estate investment trust by any person which owns (after application of subsection (d)(5) of section 856) 10 percent or more (by vote or value) of the stock or beneficial interests in the trust shall be taken into account in computing annualized income installments under paragraph (2) in a manner similar to the manner under which partnership income inclusions are taken into account.

children.heading: Closely held REIT
children.label: B Closely held REIT
children.text: For purposes of subparagraph (A), the term “closely held real estate investment trust” means a real estate investment trust with respect to which 5 or fewer persons own (after application of subsection (d)(5) of section 856) 50 percent or more (by vote or value) of the stock or beneficial interests in the trust.

children.heading: Exception where tax is small amount
children.label: f Exception where tax is small amount
children.text: No addition to tax shall be imposed under subsection (a) for any taxable year if the tax shown on the return for such taxable year (or, if no return is filed, the tax) is less than $500.

children.label: i
children.text: the tax imposed by section 11 or subchapter L of chapter 1, whichever applies,

children.label: ii
children.text: the tax imposed by section 55,

children.label: iii
children.text: the tax imposed by section 59A, plus

children.label: iv
children.text: the tax imposed by section 887, over

children.label: B
children.text: the credits against tax provided by part IV of subchapter A of chapter 1.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “large corporation” means any corporation if such corporation (or any predecessor corporation) had taxable income of $1,000,000 or more for any taxable year during the testing period.

children.heading: Testing period
children.label: i Testing period
children.text: For purposes of subparagraph (A), the term “testing period” means the 3 taxable years immediately preceding the taxable year involved.

children.heading: Members of controlled group
children.label: ii Members of controlled group
children.text: For purposes of applying subparagraph (A) to any taxable year in the testing period with respect to corporations which are component members of a controlled group of corporations for such taxable year, the $1,000,000 amount specified in subparagraph (A) shall be divided among such members under rules similar to the rules of section 1561.

children.heading: Certain carrybacks and carryovers not taken into account
children.label: iii Certain carrybacks and carryovers not taken into account
children.text: For purposes of subparagraph (A), taxable income shall be determined without regard to any amount carried to the taxable year under section 172 or 1212(a).

children.label: A
children.text: Any organization subject to the tax imposed by section 511, and any private foundation, shall be treated as a corporation subject to tax under section 11.

children.label: B
children.text: Any tax imposed by section 511, and any tax imposed by section 1 or 4940 on a private foundation, shall be treated as a tax imposed by section 11.

children.label: C
children.text: Any reference to taxable income shall be treated as including a reference to unrelated business taxable income or net investment income (as the case may be).

children.heading: Application of section to certain taxes imposed on S corporations
children.label: 4 Application of section to certain taxes imposed on S corporations
i
children.text: The tax imposed by section 1374(a).

children.label: ii
children.text: The tax imposed by section 1375(a).

children.label: iii
children.text: Any tax for which the S corporation is liable by reason of section 1371(d)(2).

children.label: B
children.text: Paragraph (2) of subsection (d) shall not apply.

children.label: I
children.text: the amount determined under clause (i) by only taking into account the taxes referred to in clauses (i) and (iii) of subsection (g)(4)(A), and

children.label: II
children.text: 100 percent of the tax imposed by section 1375(a) which was shown on the return of the corporation for the preceding taxable year.”

children.label: D
children.text: The requirement in the last sentence of subsection (d)(1)(B) that the return for the preceding taxable year show a liability for tax shall not apply.

children.label: E
children.text: Subsection (b)(2)(A) shall be applied by substituting “3rd month” for “4th month”.

children.label: F
children.text: Any reference in subsection (e) to taxable income shall be treated as including a reference to the net recognized built-in gain or the excess passive income (as the case may be).

children.heading: Addition to tax
children.label: 1 Addition to tax
children.text: If the amount of an adjustment under section 6425 made before the 15th day of the 4th month following the close of the taxable year is excessive, there shall be added to the tax under chapter 1 for the taxable year an amount determined at the underpayment rate established under section 6621 upon the excessive amount from the date on which the credit is allowed or the refund is paid to such 15th day.

children.label: A
children.text: the income tax liability (as defined in section 6425(c)) for the taxable year as shown on the return for the taxable year, exceeds

children.label: B
children.text: the estimated income tax paid during the taxable year, reduced by the amount of the adjustment.

children.heading: Fiscal years and short years
children.label: i Fiscal years and short years

children.heading: Fiscal years
children.label: 1 Fiscal years
children.text: In applying this section to a taxable year beginning on any date other than January 1, there shall be substituted, for the months specified in this section, the months which correspond thereto.

children.heading: Short taxable year
children.label: 2 Short taxable year
children.text: This section shall be applied to taxable years of less than 12 months in accordance with regulations prescribed by the Secretary.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: j Regulations
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe such regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purposes of this section.
